meta.title: Habitat 3IR — Your Home, Your Power Plant
meta.description: The central hub for sustainable renovation and the Third Industrial Revolution. Transform your home into a mini power plant in the Benelux and France.
meta.keywords: energy renovation, solar panels, heat pump, insulation, prosumer home, third industrial revolution, Rifkin, Benelux

hero.title: Transform your home into a
hero.subtitle: Sustainable renovation, renewable energy, smart home — a complete ecosystem for your energy transition in the Benelux and France.

pillars.title: The 5 Pillars of the 3rd Industrial Revolution
pillars.subtitle: According to Jeremy Rifkin, the convergence of these five pillars will radically transform our homes and our relationship with energy.

items.title: Renewable Energy
items.description: The shift to renewable energy — solar, wind, geothermal — as the primary energy source for every building.

items.title: Buildings as Mini Power Plants
items.description: Every building becomes its own mini power plant, producing and consuming its energy locally.

items.title: Energy Storage
items.description: Batteries and storage technologies make it possible to store surplus energy for later use.
items.detail: Home batteries, thermal storage, green hydrogen

items.title: Energy Internet
items.description: A smart grid that connects all buildings to share energy optimally.
items.detail: Smart grid, smart meters, AI energy management

items.title: Electric Mobility
items.description: Electric transport powered by renewable energy, integrated into the building's energy network.

solutions.title: Our Integrated Solutions
solutions.subtitle: A network of over 30 specialised sites covering every aspect of sustainable renovation and the energy transition.

blog.title: 3IR Blog
blog.subtitle: Practical guides, news and analysis on energy renovation and the Third Industrial Revolution.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: A network of certified professionals across Belgium, the Netherlands, Luxembourg and France.

contact.title: Request Your Free Quote
contact.subtitle: Receive a personalised estimate for your 3IR energy renovation project.

solteo.subtitle: Estimate your solar panel production, savings and return on investment for free with our intelligent Solteo calculator.
